closureNotes.outcome: FU-EB-PROD-DEPLOY-GAP-2026-04-21 (P1) closed with full resolution block in PR #301. Five new FUs filed open: FU-EB-CIS-SERVICES-1-PROD-TAG-DRIFT-1 (P3, cis-services-1 env:production tag drift vs canonical env-cis), FU-EB-DEPLOY-PROD-APP-HEALTH-VALIDATION-CURL-NO-FOLLOW-1 (P2, curl --no-follow false-positive in health-validation job step), FU-EB-OAUTH-SECRET-ENVSCOPED-NAMING-1 (P3, generic naming pattern for env-scoped OAuth secrets), FU-EB-BW-OAUTH-SECRET-INITIAL-WRITE-NEVER-MATCHED-GOOGLE-1 (P3, learn-from: BW initial-write never verified against GCP source-of-truth), FU-EB-VPC-PEERING-STG-PROD-ELIMINATION-1 (P2, staging-prod VPC peering elimination per eb-agent drift-vpcpeering finding). follow-up-register.json indexes rebuilt from authoritative followUps[]; version 1.7.13 to 1.7.14; pre-existing 9-FU stale-index drift from d-2026-06-04-seppa-cis-demo-path-arc cleared as side effect of rebuild (memory #26). All required CI checks green first time, no --admin override.
